fact_nuggets.text: Hustle (Japanese: Enthusiasm) is an Ability introduced in Generation III.

Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD R B Boosts Attack but lowers Accuracy. MD T D S Boosts the Pokemon's Attack but reduces its accuracy. B S L MD GtI The power of physical moves increases, but accuracy decreases. * The power of the Pokemon's physical moves goes up! But their accuracy goes down. * S MD The power of the Pokemon's physical moves goes up! But their accuracy goes down. MD RT DX The power of the Pokemon's physical moves goes up, but the accuracy goes down.

Contents 1 Effect 1.1 In battle 1.1.1 Generation III 1.1.2 Generation IV 1.1.3 Generation V onwards 1.2 Outside of battle 1.2.1 Generation VIII 1.2.2 Generation IX Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Hustle increases the user's Attack stat by 50%, but lowers the accuracy of the user's physical moves by 20% (approximated as a multiplier of 3277/4096 from Generation V onwards). OHKO moves and special moves are unaffected by Hustle. Generation III [ edit | edit source ] In addition to lowering the accuracy of the user's physical moves, Hustle lowers the accuracy of status moves with types corresponding to physical moves. [ 1 ] The type of damage dealt by Hidden Power determines whether its accuracy is affected by Hustle. Generation IV [ edit | edit source ] Status moves are no longer affected by Hustle, regardless of their type. Hustle increases self-inflicted confusion damage. Generation V onwards [ edit | edit source ] Hustle no longer affects confusion damage. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] From Pokemon Emerald onwards, if a Pokemon with Hustle is in the first slot in the party (even if fainted ), there's a 50% chance that a Pokemon will be forced to the upper bound of their encounter level range. It shares this effect with Pressure and Vital Spirit . Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] This Ability effect may be in need of research. Reason: Does Hustle's field effect work in Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl? You can discuss this on the talk page. In Pokemon Sword and Shield , Hustle appears to have no effect on the level range of wild Pokemon. Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] In Pokemon Scarlet and Violet , Hustle appears to have no effect on the level range of wild Pokemon. I Found A New Glitch in Pokemon Emerald! | Disaster Area on YouTube

Strengthens physical moves to inflict 1.5 damage, but decreases their accuracy to 0.8.
